title: I One-Shotted An Entire App With Claude Fable 5 (Full Breakdown)
summary: Jordan Urbs demonstrates building a full video editing app called "Redline" with Claude Fable 5 and Claude Code using only screenshots as input. The video discusses Fable 5's capabilities, resource consumption relative to Opus, and integration with local APIs through Venice, emphasizing local-first architecture for AI-powered applications.
writeup: Jordan Urbs builds a complete video editing app called Redline using Claude Fable 5 and Claude Code, supplying only screenshots as input to drive the build. The breakdown covers Fable 5's capabilities, its resource consumption relative to Opus, and integration with local APIs through Venice. The throughline is a local-first architecture for AI-powered applications, with screenshots serving as the primary specification for a one-shot generation.
